chapter_title: About the Superiority of the Voluntary Fasts of

hadith_entries.text:
681. Narrated Abu-Huraira: 'The Messenger of Allah **
said: "The best fasting besides (fasting in the month of)
Ramadhan is (fasting in) the month of Allah, the month of
Al Moharram 26, and the best prayer besides the obligatory
prayer is (voluntary) prayer by night." (At-Termizi)
عَائِشَةَ
مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَمْرِو
26 The first month of the lunar year.
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)

682. Narrated Umm Salama: 'I have never seen the
Prophet observing the fast for two consecutive months
except for Sha'aban and Ramadhan.' (At-Termizi)
On the same occasion, A'isha said: 'I have never seen
the Prophet observing fasting in a month more than his
fasting in Sha'aban. He used to observe fasting the whole
month apart from a few days, in fact, he used to observe
fasting the whole month.'
Ibn Al-Mobarak said: "It is permissible in Arabic when
one observes the fast for most of the month to say: 'He
observed fasting the whole month.""
